calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Stipulation re: Settlement of Case.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Lorna Walker, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff The Rough Notes Company, Inc., a corporation
Defendant Robert Marco Corsi, as an individual, aka Marc Corsi, dba Corsi Partners. Appearing on his own behalf.
Charlene Taylor sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Parties stipulated to entry of Judgment. Terms and conditions of settlement read into the record. Pursuant to stipulation of parties entry of judgment is stayed.
Plaintiff is entitled to a Judgment in the total amount of $7,005.21 with a total of six payments. Defendant made first payment today in the amount of $1,163.00.
Balance of $5,842.21 divided in 5 more payments to be made on the 26th day of the month commencing December 26, 2012 in the amount of $1,168.45 until total Judgment paid. Check to be made to Plaintiff The Rogh Notes Company, Inc. and to be delivered to The Law Offices of Sweet & Walker 6073 Mission Street, Daly City, CA 94014.
The court retains jurisdiction over the matter.
Upon total satisfaction of Judgment the Plaintiff will file a dismissal. If defendant fails to make any payments the Plaintiff will enter Judgment against defendant for the balance less any payments made plus interest on the balance. Counsel for Plaintiff to submit stipulated agreement to the court within 10 days.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted, Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF THE ROUGH NOTES COMPANY INC.'S Motion For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted, Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents, And For Sanctions is GRANTED as unopposed. Order signed. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
